title: Campaign finance — who's funding the Town Board
intro: Every current and recent Town Board member's campaign committee, pulled from New York State's open campaign-finance disclosure data (2005-2026). Numbers below are a snapshot; tap refresh to pull the latest filings straight from data.ny.gov.

officials.name: Honorable Jerome Halpin
officials.note: COMMCAND fields: candidate ID 506792, Jerome Halpin, County, TERMINATED, Supervisor, Suffolk / Riverhead Town. Committee/filer ID 506796, Friends of Jerry Halpin, County, ACTIVE, Authorized Single Candidate Committee.

officials.name: Kenneth Rothwell
officials.note: Combines filer IDs 154927 and 154926 because Rothwell also ran for Supervisor. Candidate record 154926 is County, ACTIVE, Supervisor.

officials.name: Robert "Bob" Kern
officials.note: Combines current committee 527501 with legacy committee 154941 ("Friends of Bob Kern") for the full 2005-2026 review window.

officials.name: Joann Waski
officials.note: COMMCAND fields: candidate 320292, Joann Waski, County, TERMINATED, Council Member (legacy candidate record). Committee/filer 320293, Friends of Joann Waski, County, ACTIVE, Authorized Single Candidate Committee. The TERMINATED tag is on the legacy candidate registration, not her current Town Board seat.

officials.name: Denise Merrifield
officials.note: COMMCAND fields: candidate 319755, Denise M. Merrifield, County, TERMINATED, Council Member (legacy candidate record). Committee/filer 319756, Committee to Elect Denise Merrifield, County, TERMINATED, Authorized Single Candidate Committee. These TERMINATED tags are on the legacy campaign-finance registration, not her current Town Board seat.

officials.name: Tim Hubbard
officials.note: No longer serving; included here for continuity of the campaign-finance record across the 2005-2026 window.

officials.name: Jodi Giglio
officials.office: Former Councilwoman; later NY Assembly AD-2
officials.note: No longer serving on the Town Board; records may be terminated or consolidated with her Assembly committee.

officials.name: Yvette Aguiar
officials.note: No longer serving; included here for continuity of the campaign-finance record across the 2005-2026 window.
